Tree Top Piru.description: The Tree Top Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods gang alliance. It was founded in Compton, California in the 1970s and has since spread to other parts of the United States. The gang is known for its connection to rappers such as DJ Quik and YG, and has been involved in violent crimes including murder and racketeering.

Doddington Original Gangsters.description: Primarily Afro-Caribbean street gang based in Moss Side, Manchester, UK, originating from the Pepperhill Crew in the 1980s. Controls drug trafficking and other crimes in Manchester and other cities. Engaged in long-running violent feuds with the Gooch Close Gang and Cheetham Hill Gang, contributing to the 'Gunchester' era. Still active as of the present.

Dallas crime family.description: The Dallas crime family was an Italian-American Mafia crime family based in Dallas, Texas, founded around 1910 by Carlo Piranio. It was active primarily in the Dallas metropolitan area and throughout Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas, engaging in racketeering, loansharking, drug trafficking, and other illegal activities. The family was led by Joseph Civello after Piranio's death and became defunct by the 1990s.

Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club.description: The Sin City Deciples Motorcycle Club is a mixed-race one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in Gary, Indiana in 1967. It is one of the oldest and most well-known black outlaw motorcycle clubs in the United States, with chapters across the U.S. and international presence. The club is involved in illicit drug sales and is regarded as a criminal organization by law enforcement.

Galloway Boys.description: The Galloway Boys are a Canadian street gang based in Scarborough, Ontario, founded in the early 1980s. They engage in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, murder, burglary, and racketeering. The gang recruits young impoverished men and has been involved in high-profile violence such as the Danzig Street shooting. They remain active in Scarborough and surrounding areas.
